note: Official FIFA 2026 Round-of-32 bracket. The r32 list mirrors the official slot structure and fold of data/schedule.json (matches 73-88); it is stored in bracket-fold order so the simulator's pairwise fold reproduces the real tree. 'fifa_match_order' maps each list entry (1-16) to its FIFA match number. 'official_table' encodes FIFA's Annex C third-place allocation, keyed by the sorted set of the eight groups whose third-placed team qualifies; each value maps a winner-vs-third slot's winner group to the source group of the third it faces. The realized 2026 combination (BDEFIJKL) is encoded; other combinations fall back to the documented same-group-avoiding heuristic.
fold: Sequential: Round-of-16 match k is contested by the winners of Round-of-32 list entries (2k-1, 2k). Entries 1-8 form the top half (Semi-final 1), 9-16 the bottom half (Semi-final 2). This matches the official feeds in data/schedule.json (matches 89-104) and guarantees a valid 32->16->8->4->2->1 single-elimination tree with no same-group meeting before the Round of 16.
